name: Cold Avocado and Buttermilk Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Coarsely chopped sweet onion (such as Vidalia)
2 1/2 cups Cold chicken broth, all fat removed
2 Jalapeno peppers, seeds and veins removed, cut into very small dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the onions in a blender or food processor and puree as fine as possible.
2. Peel and chunk 2 1/2 avocados; reserve the remaining half for garnish.
3. Puree again, adding broth if necessary.
4. Transfer the soup to a large bowl. Add any remaining broth and buttermilk to the blender and whirl briefly to incorporate as much avocado as possible. Stir into the soup along with almond extract and sugar, if desired.
5. The surprising combination of these ingredients enhances avocado flavor when used in small amounts. Taste and adjust salt levels. For best results, allow the soup to warm slightly before serving; it should be cold but not icy.
6. Peel the remaining half avocado and slice very thinly. Divide the soup among six bowls and top with sliced avocado and cilantro. Serve with crisp tortilla chips.
Makes 6 servings.
